summary: Tested PlacesAutocomplete bug fix for mobile 'Address not found' error. All critical features working: Home page booking form renders correctly with pickup/dropoff inputs, Google Maps autocomplete loads and shows suggestions on both desktop and mobile viewports, city transfer pages (CDG, Orly, Disneyland) load with correct titles and booking forms, backend proxy API /api/proxy/preorder-distance returns vehicle pricing correctly, navigation between pages works.
critical_code_review_comments: PlacesAutocomplete.js fix looks correct: lastSelectedAddrRef guard (line 28, 37, 86) prevents onChange from clearing coords when value matches selected address
Extended justSelectedRef timeout from 500ms to 2000ms (line 49) handles slow mobile browsers
PlaceId-based geocoding as first fallback strategy in Home.js (line 204-206) and CityTransferPage.js (line 131-133) is properly implemented
Unclosed parenthesis handling in geocodeAddress regex (line 215-216 in Home.js, line 142-143 in CityTransferPage.js) correctly strips problematic patterns

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, autocomplete works, navigation works)

test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for tested features
context_for_next_testing_agent: PlacesAutocomplete bug fix verified working. Google Maps autocomplete loads dynamically, shows suggestions, and selections work on both desktop and mobile. The fix implements: 1) lastSelectedAddrRef guard to prevent onChange from clearing coords, 2) Extended 2000ms timeout for mobile, 3) PlaceId-based geocoding fallback. All city transfer pages (CDG, Orly, Disneyland) display correct titles with prices.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Address not found error on mobile when using Google Maps Autocomplete for Dropoff field - coordinates wiped by race condition

fix_implemented.lastSelectedAddrRef_guard: Prevents onChange from clearing coords when input value matches last selected address
fix_implemented.extended_timeout: justSelectedRef timeout extended from 500ms to 2000ms for slow mobile browsers
fix_implemented.placeId_geocoding: PlaceId-based geocoding as first fallback strategy before address text geocoding
fix_implemented.unclosed_paren_handling: Regex to strip unclosed parentheses from address strings

bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - Autocomplete works correctly on mobile viewport (390x844), selections persist, no 'Address not found' errors observed
